title: Command Cockpit Insight Ribbon
summary: Focused Quest nodes now project compact milestone, blocker, bot, proof, and next-move signals inside the existing cockpit board.

verification.intent: Make clicked path nodes feel deeper without adding another vertical report section.
verification.accessibility: The ribbon is labelled from the focused Quest node and remains inside the existing Quest level map.
verification.motion: The ribbon sweep is transform-only and covered by the global reduced-motion rule.
